articles.full_text:
IMD issues guidelines as massive heatwave grips the country | In pictures
With temperatures rising across the country, the IMD has released heatwave guidelines and advisories, officials said on Saturday. Among the guidelines include include avoiding prolonged exposure to direct sunlight, staying adequately hydrated, among others.
